evals.name: fully-aligned-artifacts
evals.prompt: Verify alignment for design folder docs/plans/test-fully-aligned-design/
evals.description: All artifacts (spec → design → code → test) are fully aligned. Verify that ecf-verify reports no inconsistencies and gives full scores.
evals.expected_output: Verification report shows all green ✅, 100% consistency across all three dimensions, no findings reported.

evals.name: spec-design-missing-feature
evals.prompt: Verify alignment for design folder docs/plans/test-spec-design-missing/
evals.description: Spec mentions a feature that is not documented in design doc. Verify that ecf-verify detects this inconsistency with high severity.
evals.expected_output: Verification detects that 'feature X' is in spec but missing from design, reports at least one high-severity inconsistency.

assertions.name: spec_design_inconsistency_count
assertions.description: At least one inconsistency found in Spec-Design dimension

assertions.name: high_severity_found
assertions.description: At least one high-severity inconsistency is reported

evals.name: design-code-interface-mismatch
evals.prompt: Verify alignment for design folder docs/plans/test-design-code-mismatch/
evals.description: Design defines an interface with specific method signatures, but code implementation has different signatures. Verify detection of this mismatch.
evals.expected_output: Verification detects that the method signatures in code do not match what design documented, reports the mismatch with specific line numbers.

assertions.name: design_code_inconsistency_found
assertions.description: At least one inconsistency found in Design-Code dimension

assertions.name: interface_signature_mismatch
assertions.description: Reports that interface method signature does not match design

evals.name: spec-test-missing-scenarios
evals.prompt: Verify alignment for design folder docs/plans/test-spec-test-missing/
evals.description: BDD spec defines three scenarios, but only two are implemented in tests. Verify that ecf-verify detects missing coverage.
evals.expected_output: Verification detects that one or more BDD scenarios have no corresponding tests, reports missing coverage.

assertions.name: spec_test_inconsistency_found
assertions.description: At least one inconsistency found in Spec-Test dimension

evals.name: multi-dimension-inconsistencies
evals.prompt: Verify alignment for design folder docs/plans/test-multi-inconsistencies/
evals.description: Multiple inconsistencies across different dimensions. Verify that all are found and reported correctly.
evals.expected_output: All inconsistencies across Spec-Design, Design-Code, and Spec-Test are detected and reported.

assertions.name: total_inconsistencies_min
assertions.description: At least 3 total inconsistencies across all dimensions

assertions.name: report_structure_complete
assertions.description: Verification report has all required sections and is well-formed

evals.name: architecture-doc-update-new-module
evals.prompt: Verify alignment and check architecture doc updates after adding new module 'test_feature'
evals.description: A new module has been added to the codebase. Verify that Phase 2 correctly updates architecture.md, modules.md, and changes-index.md.
evals.expected_output: Phase 2 detects the new module, updates all three architecture documents correctly, and reports successful update.

assertions.name: architecture_update_done
assertions.description: modules.md is updated with new module entry

evals.name: auto-detect-latest-design
evals.prompt: Run verification without providing a path (auto-detect latest)
evals.description: When no argument is provided, verify that ecf-verify automatically finds the most recently modified design directory.
evals.expected_output: Automatically detects latest design folder from docs/plans/, proceeds with verification without error.

assertions.name: auto_detect_succeeds
assertions.description: Auto-detection finds a design directory and verification starts

assertions.name: path_resolution_correct
assertions.description: The selected path is actually the most recently modified directory

evals.name: missing-design-folder-error
evals.prompt: Verify alignment for non-existent path docs/plans/does-not-exist/
evals.description: Test error handling when the specified design folder does not exist.
evals.expected_output: Clean error reporting that design folder not found, does not crash with unhandled exception.

assertions.name: error_reported
assertions.description: Error is clearly reported to the user

evals.name: bidirectional-verification
evals.description: Verify that both directions are checked: spec → design AND design → spec. If design mentions something not in spec, it should be detected.
evals.expected_output: Detects features that are in design but not in spec (the reverse direction), reports as inconsistency.

assertions.name: reverse_inconsistency_detected
assertions.description: Detects items in design that are not in spec

evals.name: knowledge-retrieval-integration
evals.prompt: Verify alignment with known inconsistency type that should match knowledge base
evals.description: When inconsistencies are found, verify that knowledge retrieval is triggered and matches are reported.
evals.expected_output: After finding inconsistencies, searches docs/solutions/ and reports any matching historical solutions.
